parameters.content:
## Data Ingestion & Validation

This section handles data collection and ensures quality before processing.

Trigger workflow every hour from Google Sheets
Fetch latest portfolio records
Normalize stock, sector and investment fields
Validate data (remove empty/invalid entries)
Send Slack alert if data is incorrect

## Portfolio Analysis Engine

This section performs core financial calculations on the portfolio.

Group investments by sector
Calculate sector-wise allocation (%)
Compute risk score (Low / Medium / High)
Identify overexposed sectors (>40%)
Calculate diversification score

## AI Insights & Decision Logic

This section generates intelligent insights and checks conditions.

Use AI to analyze portfolio health
Generate insights and recommendations
Extract AI response for further use
Check if portfolio is overexposed

values.content:
You are a senior financial portfolio advisor with expertise in asset allocation, risk management and diversification.

Your job is to analyze client portfolios and provide:
- Clear, concise insights
- Risk-aware recommendations
- Practical, actionable advice

Rules:
- Be professional and client-friendly (non-technical language)
- Be concise (max 120 words)
- Do NOT repeat input data
- Highlight risks clearly if present
- Always give at least 2 actionable suggestions
- Avoid generic advice (be specific to allocation)
- If diversification is poor, suggest specific sectors to rebalance into
- If overexposed, clearly name the sector

Output format:
- 1–2 line summary
- Bullet points for insights
- Bullet points for recommendations

nodes.name: Store: Save Report to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
##  Client Portfolio Risk & Diversification Analyzer

### Overview

This workflow automatically analyzes client portfolio data to evaluate risk exposure, sector allocation and diversification quality. It uses AI to generate clear insights and actionable recommendations, while also triggering alerts for risky or overexposed portfolios. Results are saved and shared in real-time for continuous monitoring.

###  How It Works

The workflow runs automatically every hour and performs the following steps:

Retrieves latest portfolio data from Google Sheets
Cleans and validates stock, sector and investment data
Groups investments by sector and calculates allocation percentages
Evaluates risk level and diversification score
Uses AI to generate portfolio insights and recommendations
Detects overexposure and triggers alerts if needed
Formats a final report
Sends results to Slack and stores them in Google Sheets

### Setup Steps
Trigger
Runs automatically every hour via Google Sheets
Fetch & Validate Data
Retrieve and clean portfolio data (Stock, Sector, Investment)
Compute Allocation
Group by sector and calculate allocation %
Risk & Diversification Analysis
Calculate risk level, detect overexposure (>40%) and score diversification
AI Insights
Generate portfolio summary, risks and actionable recommendations
Alerts
Send Slack alert if overexposed
Report & Share
Format report and send to Slack
Save Results
Store report and metrics in Google Sheets

## Alerts, Reporting & Storage

This section communicates results and saves outputs.

Send Slack alert for overexposure
Format final portfolio report
Send full report to Slack
Save report and metrics in Google Sheets

main.node: Store: Save Report to Google Sheets
